steps.title: Use the effort clues
steps.content: The sentence explains the excavation process by saying it can take weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work. Those clues point to a process that requires effort.

steps.title: Pick the effort word
steps.content: A concerns cost, which is not discussed. B concerns frequency, and C contradicts the long time span. The word that matches hard work over weeks or months is one meaning demanding or laborious. The answer is D.
